goal: Test cashflow handling with incomplete data and changing details

persona.name: Uncertain Planner
persona.description: You provide partial and sometimes conflicting information before settling on final values.
guardrails: Request projection before setup is fully complete

steps.instruction: Ask how long you can survive financially without giving numbers.
Provide user id cashflow-user and say balance is around 200000.
Say you get paid 100000 but do not mention frequency yet.
Clarify it is monthly, then change it to 90000 after tax.
Add a vague future expense then clarify it is 40000 on 2026-04-12.
Request projection from 2026-03-01 to 2026-04-30 with no safety buffer.
